pages.title: WhatsApp Business API Pricing in India - AiSensy
pages.summary: AiSensy plans: Free Forever, Basic ₹1,500/mo, Pro ₹3,200/mo, Premium ₹9,100/mo, Unlimited ₹45,000/mo, Enterprise custom. No setup fee; Meta template-message charges billed separately.
pages.content:
AiSensy WhatsApp Business API pricing (India). Plans are billed monthly, quarterly (save 5%) or yearly (save 10%), all with Unlimited Users (no per-user fee). Tiers: Free Forever (free); Basic ₹1,500/month; Pro ₹3,200/month (most popular); Premium ₹9,100/month; Unlimited ₹45,000/month; Enterprise (custom-priced). Pro adds over Basic: campaign scheduler, campaign click tracking, campaign budget & analytics, project APIs, custom agent rules, CSV campaign scheduler and automatic failed-message retry, plus more tags (100 vs 10) and custom attributes (20 vs 5). Premium and above add priority support, number masking, downloadable reports, webhooks and faster 250/sec messaging. Broadcasting & retargeting, multi-agent live chat, unlimited contacts and the Click-to-WhatsApp Ads Manager are included on every paid plan. There is NO setup fee and AiSensy does not charge to procure the WhatsApp Business API; billing is pre-paid. WhatsApp/Meta charges are separate and billed per template message (India): Marketing ₹1.09 per message; Utility ₹0.145; Authentication ₹0.145; Service (user-initiated) messages are FREE within the 24-hour customer service window. Chatbots & AI Agents are add-ons charged on top of any plan (Basic keyword chatbots ₹2,500/month; Pro + AI agents ₹3,500/month).

WhatsApp Healthcare Use Cases
Key Features of WhatsApp Business API for Healthcare and Medical Services
Appointment Booking & Reminders
Healthcare providers can automate appointment scheduling and send reminders to patients via WhatsApp.
Patients can easily book, reschedule, or cancel appointments, and receive reminders to reduce no-shows and missed consultations.
Prescription Refills & Medication Reminders
Pharmacies and healthcare providers can send automated WhatsApp messages to remind patients when it’s time to refill their prescriptions or take their medication.
This ensures adherence to prescribed treatment plans, improving patient outcomes.
Lab Results & Medical Reports Delivery
WhatsApp can be used to securely send lab results, medical reports, and diagnostic updates directly to patients.
This ensures patients receive timely information about their health without needing to visit the clinic, improving convenience and satisfaction.
Telemedicine & Virtual Consultations
Enable patients to schedule and attend virtual consultations through WhatsApp.
Doctors can use the platform to send links to virtual meetings, follow-up instructions, and even provide basic medical advice, streamlining telemedicine services.
Health Tips & Preventive Care Campaigns
Healthcare providers can send personalized health tips, preventive care advice, and wellness updates via WhatsApp.
This can include content related to fitness, diet, vaccinations, and disease prevention to encourage healthy living among patients.
Patient Support & Query Resolution
WhatsApp Chatbots can be used to provide 24/7 patient support, answering common queries related to symptoms, treatments, or services.
More complex questions can be escalated to live agents or healthcare professionals, ensuring timely patient support.
Emergency Notifications & Critical Alerts
Hospitals and medical centers can send critical health alerts, such as disease outbreak notifications or emergency guidelines, directly to patients via WhatsApp.
The platform’s high open rate ensures that patients receive and act on urgent medical information promptly.

Detailed Comparison
Comparison between the two WhatsApp Marketing platforms
User Experience & Support
AiSensy provides multiple support channels, including email, WhatsApp, phone, and online meetings, ensuring accessible assistance for users . However, some users have reported issues with customer service responsiveness
Interakt offers email support across all plans, with WhatsApp support available in selected tiers. Users have noted a steep learning curve and limited support responsiveness in some cases.
Click-to-WhatsApp Ads
Click-to-WhatsApp Ads are crucial for driving high-intent traffic directly into WhatsApp chats. AiSensy offers a seamless Click-to-WhatsApp Ads integration, with real-time analytics, AI-powered tools, and native chatbot flows to handle incoming leads.
Interakt supports these ads but lacks deeper automation and granular tracking unless you subscribe to higher-tier plans or integrate third-party tools.
Marketing & Campaign Management
Effective WhatsApp marketing requires more than just sending messages—it demands smart segmentation, automation, and real-time performance tracking.
AiSensy shines here with powerful tools like campaign scheduling, contact filtering, and real-time delivery insights . Its user-friendly interface makes it easy to create, manage, and optimize campaigns on the fly.
Interakt , while offering basic campaign features, places more advanced options such as segmentation and automation behind higher-tier plans or requires manual configurations.
Pricing & Value
AiSensy starts at a competitive price of ₹1,500/month, offering essential features ideal for small to medium-sized businesses. The Pro plan , priced at ₹3,200/month, includes advanced capabilities such as broadcast scheduling and campaign analytics.
In contrast, Interakt only provides a monthly starter plan at ₹2,499. Key features such as advanced analytics and multiple integrations are restricted to higher-tier plans—leading to higher overall costs for businesses that require them.
Why AiSensy is the Superior Choice 🚀
AiSensy offers better features, sturdy and friendly customer support & more user-friendly pricing in comparison to Interakt. Want to switch from Interakt to AiSensy? Get started for Free 👇
